agent_instruction: Repair the confound specification/design, or return a fragile/needs_more_data disposition.
Revise search provenance/family size honestly, or return a fragile disposition.
Do not force confirmation; request more data or return an under_powered/needs_more_data disposition.
Return a fragile disposition unless a new predeclared study design is available.
Request independent replication evidence or return a non_replicated/needs_more_data disposition.
Return a fragile disposition or propose a new confirmatory design.
